description: A project manager for a new library construction needs to update the project plan to show that the foundation has been completed.

nodes.task_description: Open the project plan for the library construction.

expected_outcome.expected: The manager opens the correct project file.

nodes.task_description: Locate the 'Foundation Pour' milestone in the project plan.

expected_outcome.expected: The manager finds the relevant task.

nodes.task_description: Mark the milestone as 'Complete' and enter the completion date.

expected_outcome.expected: The manager successfully updates the project plan, which may automatically trigger notifications to other stakeholders.
